patch:
From 36a028bee61ee058b6f650f341b4e5fd05e037eb Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: Tomasz Czubocha <tomasz.czubocha@gmail.com>
Date: Wed, 8 Jan 2025 15:25:37 +0100
Subject: [PATCH] feat: add support for ap-southeast-5 and ca-west-1

---
 lib/plugins/aws/provider.js | 2 ++
 1 file changed, 2 insertions(+)

diff --git a/lib/plugins/aws/provider.js b/lib/plugins/aws/provider.js
index 3fcbcf24cf1..b75187171ca 100644
--- a/lib/plugins/aws/provider.js
+++ b/lib/plugins/aws/provider.js
@@ -1379,7 +1379,9 @@ class AwsProvider {
                 'ap-southeast-2',
                 'ap-southeast-3',
                 'ap-southeast-4',
+                'ap-southeast-5',
                 'ca-central-1',
+                'ca-west-1',
                 'cn-north-1',
                 'cn-northwest-1',
                 'eu-central-1',
